---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or workflow improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

What user problem should this solve?

## Proposed Area

- [ ] CLI
- [ ] GUI
- [ ] doctor-core
- [ ] Backup / restore
- [ ] History / repair tracking
- [ ] Docs / repo workflow

## Current Gap

What is missing today? Be concrete.

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the desired behavior, command, screen flow, or API shape.

## Why This Matters

What does this unblock or improve?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Behavior is clear
- [ ] Verification path is clear
- [ ] Scope is small enough for one PR

Add concrete acceptance bullets here:

- 
- 
- 

## Suggested Verification

If you already know the expected checks, list them:

```bash
cargo fmt --all --check
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
cargo test
```

## Additional Context

Screenshots, examples, related issues, or notes about fixture / platform constraints.
